activities.name: Get Tag Metadata from Unify View
activities.description:
Get tag metadata from Unify view CTL.VW_AVEVA_PI_TAG_NAME_DATES.
Includes StartTime and EndTime which are calculated at run time or overriden.

dependsOn.activity: Key Vault - Get ADF SVC Acct Username
Get Tag Metadata from Unify View

activities.name: PI Web API - Health Check
activities.description: Call /points endpoint for the first TagName as an API health check

username.value: @activity('Key Vault - Get ADF SVC Acct Username').output.value

activities.name: Key Vault - Get ADF SVC Acct Username
If Condition - API Health Check
activities.description: Check if vFirstTagName equals vHealthCheckTagName. If true, proceed further with the pipeline, else fail as it is assumed the API is not in a healthy state.

activities.name: Check Validation Log Table
activities.description: Check if any validation error records require a notification to be sent.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
CASE WHEN COUNT(RecordID) > 0 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END AS ErrorsDetected
FROM [CTL].[ESG_SHAREPOINT_PDF_VALIDATON_LOG]
WHERE NotificationSent = 0

activities.name: Script - Update Error Log Table NotificationSent

body.value:
@concat(
  'grant_type=client_credentials',
  '&client_id=', activity('KV - Get ADF SharePoint ClientID').output.value,'@', activity('KV - Get ADF SharePoint TenantID').output.value,
  '&client_secret=', activity('KV - Get ADF SharePoint Secret').output.value,
  '&resource=00000003-0000-0ff1-ce00-000000000000/cleancoqueensland.sharepoint.com@',
     activity('KV - Get ADF SharePoint TenantID').output.value
)

activities.name: Set variable FolderTimeString
activities.description: Creates a folder path based on UTC time to be shared by all files being archived.

value.value:
@concat(
formatDateTime(utcNow(),'yyyy'),'/',
formatDateTime(utcNow(),'MM'),'/',
formatDateTime(utcNow(),'dd'),'/',
formatDateTime(utcNow(),'hh'),'/',
formatDateTime(utcNow(),'mm'),'/',
formatDateTime(utcNow(),'ss'),'/'
)

dependsOn.activity: Key Vault - Get ADF SVC Acct Username

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@CONCAT('SELECT 
	SCHEMA_NAME(tab.schema_id) AS SCHEMA_NAME,
    tab.name AS TABLE_NAME, 
	tab.type AS TYPE,
    col.name AS COLUMN_NAME, 
    col.column_id AS COLUMN_POSITION,
    t.name AS DATA_TYPE,    
    col.max_length AS LENGTH,
    col.precision AS PRECISION,
	col.scale AS SCALE,
	CASE 
		WHEN pks.column_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 0
	END AS PRIMARY_KEY_FLAG,
	pks.index_column_id AS PRIMARY_KEY_POSITION,
	NULL AS PRIMARY_KEY_SORT_ORDER
FROM (SELECT 
		name,
		object_id,
		schema_id,
		''Table'' AS type
	FROM sys.tables
	WHERE type = ''U''
	UNION
	SELECT 
		name,
		object_id,
		schema_id,
		''View'' AS type
	FROM sys.views
	WHERE is_ms_shipped = 0) tab
    INNER JOIN sys.columns col 
		ON tab.object_id = col.object_id
    LEFT JOIN 
	/*Necessary to associate custom data types to their correct system data type*/
	(SELECT stypes.*, utypes.user_type_id AS correct_user_type_id FROM 
		(SELECT * FROM sys.types
		WHERE is_user_defined = 0 and system_type_id = user_type_id) stypes 
	 INNER JOIN  sys.types utypes ON stypes.system_type_id = utypes.system_type_id)  t 
		ON col.user_type_id = t.correct_user_type_id
	LEFT JOIN (
		SELECT 
			ic.object_id
			, ic.column_id
			, ic.index_column_id
		FROM sys.indexes pk
		INNER JOIN sys.index_columns ic
			ON ic.object_id = pk.object_id
			AND ic.index_id = pk.index_id
		WHERE pk.is_primary_key = 1
	) pks ON col.object_id = pks.object_id 
		AND col.column_id = pks.column_id
WHERE SCHEMA_NAME(tab.schema_id)=''', pipeline().parameters.pl_param_schemaName,
''' ORDER BY schema_name,
    tab.name, 
    col.column_id'
)

@CONCAT('SELECT 
	SCHEMA_NAME(tab.schema_id) AS SCHEMA_NAME,
    tab.name AS TABLE_NAME, 
	tab.type AS TYPE,
    col.name AS COLUMN_NAME, 
    col.column_id AS COLUMN_POSITION,
    CASE
		WHEN t.name IS NOT NULL THEN t.name 
		ELSE ''nvarchar''
	END AS DATA_TYPE,    
    col.max_length AS LENGTH,
    col.precision AS PRECISION,
	col.scale AS SCALE,
	CASE 
		WHEN pks.column_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 0
	END AS PRIMARY_KEY_FLAG,
	pks.index_column_id AS PRIMARY_KEY_POSITION,
	NULL AS PRIMARY_KEY_SORT_ORDER
FROM (SELECT 
		name,
		object_id,
		schema_id,
		''Table'' AS type
	FROM sys.tables
	WHERE type = ''U''
	UNION
	SELECT 
		name,
		object_id,
		schema_id,
		''View'' AS type
	FROM sys.views
	WHERE is_ms_shipped = 0) tab
    INNER JOIN sys.columns col 
		ON tab.object_id = col.object_id
    LEFT JOIN 
	/*Necessary to associate custom data types to their correct system data type*/
	(SELECT stypes.*, utypes.user_type_id AS correct_user_type_id FROM 
		(SELECT * FROM sys.types
		WHERE is_user_defined = 0 and system_type_id = user_type_id) stypes 
	 INNER JOIN  sys.types utypes ON stypes.system_type_id = utypes.system_type_id)  t 
		ON col.user_type_id = t.correct_user_type_id
	LEFT JOIN (
		SELECT 
			ic.object_id
			, ic.column_id
			, ic.index_column_id
		FROM sys.indexes pk
		INNER JOIN sys.index_columns ic
			ON ic.object_id = pk.object_id
			AND ic.index_id = pk.index_id
		WHERE pk.is_primary_key = 1
	) pks ON col.object_id = pks.object_id 
		AND col.column_id = pks.column_id
WHERE SCHEMA_NAME(tab.schema_id)=''', pipeline().parameters.pl_param_schemaName, 
''' AND tab.name=''', pipeline().parameters.pl_param_tableName,
''' ORDER BY schema_name,
    tab.name, 
    col.column_id'
)
